states.name: Dark Ludmilla
states.title: Marshal of Darkness
states.description: The Greyford soldiers were filled with skepticism. "I heard that an instructor is being sent from Rigland to train us. And a woman at that." "Hah, a woman? Such an insult. Maybe we should show her a little affection."

states.name: Dark Ludmilla
states.title: Marshal of Darkness
states.description:
"She's a demon... She's come here to kill us all..."
The Greyford soldiers couldn't help but mutter this under their breath. But as for Ludmilla, she simply loved training and sincerely wished, more than anyone else, for them to become stronger.

states.name: Dark Ludmilla
states.title: Marshal of Darkness
states.description: Ludmilla burned with a passion. Her orders were to train the soldiers of an allied nation. And though she is usually calm and intelligent, because of her overwhelming love and passion for training, she had become unusually simple-minded. So much so that she fell for a simple hypnotism...
